items.summary: The president’s middle son is said to be joining his father in a “personal capacity” rather than to make business deals.

items.author: NYT Business
items.text: Trump Administration Pushes I.R.S. to Identify Undocumented Immigrants
items.summary: The deliberations are a sign that the Trump administration may once again try to harness the power of the I.R.S. to advance its immigration agenda.

items.author: NYT Business
items.text: An Uncertain World Awaits the Reopening of the Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: Fatih Birol of the International Energy Agency, who orchestrated a multinational release of oil reserves, detailed the risks facing the economy now and beyond.

items.author: Financial Times
items.text: US Senate confirms Warsh to succeed Powell as Fed chair
items.summary: Vote brings to an end one of the most fraught processes of selecting a central bank chief in decades

items.author: Financial Times
items.text: US wholesale inflation hits 6% as Iran war sends fuel and freight costs soaring
items.summary: Producer price index rises at fastest rate since Russia’s full-scale invasion of Ukraine

items.author: MarketWatch
items.text: Ford’s stock is the S&P 500’s biggest gainer. The carmaker is putting a very Tesla spin on things.
items.summary: Ford’s stock is having its best day in six years, after Morgan Stanley gave a rosy outlook for the automaker’s energy business.
